title: Height of Eva unit 01 in 222
wikitext:
[]: Height of Eva unit 01 in 2.22             Quote Post by Craftee » Sat Mar 22, 2014 9:16 pm I tried searching for Unit 01's height in 2.22 but i found no luck. If you guys could help me figure this out, much appreciated! im looking for exact measurements ( not estimates ) I made this composite from 2.22 but cant use it due to it's perspective. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Mar 22, 2014 9:46 pm The Evas in ENT have been fixed at 80m to the top of pylons 1.0 CRC height chart, 10m grid: http://i.minus.com/igS45GIVpAT7e.jpg 2.0 CRC height chart, 4m grid: http://i.minus.com/ibgkEG1k64iXNM.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Craftee » Sat Mar 22, 2014 9:49 pm Thank you so much! I found the 1.0 scale, but couldn't find the 2.0 scale.
